specific_question: When did the CRM mobile app become available to Sales Team Representatives at Elexion Automotive?
answer: In February 2023, Amanda Lee implemented a CRM mobile application which allows the Sale Team Representatives to log customer interactions on the go.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
